_comment: Per-bucket in-scope PASS-COUNT floor for the WPT regression gate (scripts/wpt-scoreboard.php). Gate on counts, not percentages: counts are stable while the corpus total drifts. `tolerance` absorbs rasterisation ±1 jitter. Refresh after intentional gains with: php scripts/wpt-scoreboard.php --update. Numbers are settler-OFF (deterministic, no Playwright dependency).
